name: 7'x10' Jungle Rectangular Woven Outdoor Area Rug Multicolor - Threshold™
description:
Turn your patio or deck space into an irresistible outdoor oasis with the help of the Jungle Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Made from durable fabric that stands up to the elements, this eye-catching outdoor rug features an allover pattern of tropical leaves and flowers in shades of green and pink, and the ends are finished with cream tassels for a touch of visual texture. The seven- by ten-foot size makes this rug ideal for patios, screened porches and other outdoor entertainment spaces. Plus, it's ultra easy to clean — simply spray off dirt and debris with a garden hose or wipe clean with a damp cloth to keep it looking its best.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
